name: Sodium Salicylate Salicylic Acid Sodium Salt - 5000g
description:
Sodium Salicylate - 5000g


CAS Number: 54-21-7
Sum Formula: C7H6NaO3
Molar Mass: 160.11 g/mol
Appearance: White crystalline powder

Applications:
Sodium salicylate is primarily used in the chemical industry as a pharmaceutical intermediate and as a stabilizer in the production of various chemicals. It has analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties and is used in the manufacturing of topical formulations. Additionally, it is used in some industrial applications as a reagent or stabilizer in different chemical processes.

Safety:
Signal Word: Warning

Hazard Statements:
H302 Harmful if swallowed.
H319 Causes eye irritation.
H361d Suspected of damaging the unborn child.

Precautionary Statements:
P280 Wear protective gloves/eye protection.
P305+P351+P338 IF IN EYES: Rinse cautiously with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses, if present and easy to do. Continue rinsing.

First Aid Measures:

Skin Contact: Wash with soap and water. Seek medical attention if irritation persists.

Eye Contact: Rinse immediately with water for several minutes. If irritation persists, seek medical attention.

Inhalation: Move to fresh air. Seek medical attention if symptoms persist.

Ingestion: Rinse mouth with water. Seek medical attention if feeling unwell.

Handling and Storage:
Storage Conditions: Store in a cool, dry, well-ventilated area. Keep container tightly closed and away from incompatible substances.
Handling Precautions: Avoid ingestion, eye contact, and inhalation. Use appropriate personal protective equipment.
